title: Rich Savory Peruvian Chicken Causa Limena
description: A hearty Peruvian dish made with chicken, potatoes, and aji amarillo peppers, perfect for a comforting meal. This causa limena features a mother sauce base and ground nut oil for added richness.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat the ground nut oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped aji amarillo peppers and cook until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the ground chicken, mashed potatoes, and cooked pepper mixture.
Stir in the mother sauce, lime juice, and salt until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
